allow: PowerShell($tools = @\('pandoc','wkhtmltopdf','npx'\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t -> $\($c.Source\)" } else { "$t -> NOT FOUND" } }; "--- chrome/edge ---"; @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { "FOUND: $_" } else { "missing: $_" } })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.md','.pdf' -or $_.Name -match 'PREP|COMPARISON|INVOICE' } | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)
